requirement_text: The OMT implementation shall define the scope of supported FOM, SOM, and MIM object-model documentation and interchange.

requirement_text: The OMT implementation shall support interoperable object-model documentation sufficient for federates and RTIs to agree on shared classes, attributes, interactions, parameters, datatypes, dimensions, and metadata.
